Document:
Anomalies (Shadekin) are crew-aligned and have to act like other crew: as if spacelaw applies to them. Just like any other crew you may break spacelaw for RP causes, but within reason.
Furthermore, you cannot use your teleport abilities that result in secure tresspass, without permission from command or all of the department workers. With exception to moments where there is no command on the station and no related workers. Refrain from obtaining items such as the spare captain ID, command remote and things of that nature.
In the event of player controlled antagonists, actions like stalking antags and calling out their locations/actions/etc. While using the phase ability is considered an offense (we have station AI for a reason) as it will be unfun for antagonists to do their thing. Also do not hunt down antagonists with your phasing/cloaking abilities, if you want to assist the crew consider acting as a (para)medic with your abilities. Or a on-the-go front-line arms deliverer by requesting permission from security or command.
Anomalies aren't legally crew therefore they do not enjoy the rights extended to crew by spacelaw. A spacelaw infraction could result in a kill on sight order from command or the warden. (The captain may veto it) Since anomalies are amicible to the crew, the crew are not allowed to attack them or restrain them for no reason.
